# Ownership map — test fixture

A trimmed ownership map for the parser tests.

## The fixture entities

| Entity | Owning Service Domain | Pattern |
|---|---|---|
| E-09 Asset Class | SD-99.1 Sample With Service Operations | Single owner |
| E-99 Sample Core Entity | SD-99.1 Sample With Service Operations | Single owner |
| **E-27 Sample Co-Owned Entity** | **SD-99.1 Sample With Service Operations + SD-99.2 Sample Without Service Operations** | **Co-owned** |
| PM-99 Sample Specialisation Entity | SD-99.2 Sample Without Service Operations | Single owner |
